controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (local area banks - concentration risk management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks -
Concentration Risk Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (local area banks - concentration risk management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon issuance
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect immediately upon issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to local area banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Local Area Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to local area banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear the
meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meaning assigned to them in the ensuing paragraphs

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise tier i and tier ii capital as defined in the reserve bank of india (local area banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(1) "Capital Funds for exposure norms" shall comprise Tier I and Tier II capital as
defined in the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Prudential Norms on Capital
Adequacy) Directions, 2025, and as per the published accounts as on March 31 of the
previous year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise tier i and tier ii capital as defined in the reserve bank of india (local area banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure from taking exposure in excess of the regulatory ceiling in anticipation of infusion of capital at a future date
controls.control_description:
Banks are also prohibited from taking
exposure in excess of the regulatory ceiling in anticipation of infusion of capital at a future
date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to from taking exposure in excess of the regulatory ceiling in anticipation of infusion of capital at a future date

controls.control_objective: To ensure include credit exposure (funded and non-funded credit limits) and investment exposure (including underwriting and similar commitments)
controls.control_description:
(2) "Exposure" shall include credit exposure (funded and non-funded credit limits) and
investment exposure (including underwriting and similar commitments).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include credit exposure (funded and non-funded credit limits) and investment exposure (including underwriting and similar commitments)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for arriving at the exposure limit
controls.control_description:
The sanctioned
limits or outstandings, whichever are higher, shall be reckoned for arriving at the exposure
limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be reckoned for arriving at the exposure limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure reckon the outstanding as the exposure
controls.control_description:
However, in the case of fully drawn term loans, where there is no scope for re-drawal
of any portion of the sanctioned limit, banks may reckon the outstanding as the exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reckon the outstanding as the exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as under: explanation:
controls.control_description:
The credit exposure, investment exposure and exposure for derivative products shall be
reckoned as under:
Explanation:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as under: explanation:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as have been
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934 or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as used in commercial
parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or any statutory mod

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a comprehensive board approved policy on concentration risk management, which shall, inter alia, include
controls.control_description:
The bank shall put in place a comprehensive Board approved policy on
Concentration Risk Management, which shall, inter alia, include.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a comprehensive board approved policy on concentration risk management, which shall, inter alia, include

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than 15 percent and 40 percent of its capital funds, respectively
controls.control_description:
A bank's credit exposure to a single and group borrower shall not be higher than 15
percent and 40 percent of its capital funds, respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher than 15 percent and 40 percent of its capital funds, respectively

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exempted from the exposure ceiling of 15 percent of its capital funds applicable to single borrower
controls.control_description:
A bank's exposures to QCCPs related to clearing activities shall be exempted from the
exposure ceiling of 15 percent of its capital funds applicable to single borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exempted from the exposure ceiling of 15 percent of its capital funds applicable to single borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the exposure ceiling of 15 percent of its capital funds applicable to single borrower
controls.control_description:
A bank's exposure to non-QCCPs shall be subject to the exposure ceiling of 15 percent
of its capital funds applicable to single borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the exposure ceiling of 15 percent of its capital funds applicable to single borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than 10 percent and 15 percent of its capital funds, respectively
controls.control_description:
A bank's loan and investment exposure to a single NBFC and group NBFC borrower
shall not be higher than 10 percent and 15 percent of its capital funds, respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be higher than 10 percent and 15 percent of its capital funds, respectively

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 7
controls.control_description:
such loans comprising
50 percent or more of its financial assets, shall not exceed 7.5 percent of the bank's capital
funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 7

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be applicable to lending under consortium / multiple banking / syndication arrangements
controls.control_description:
The exposure limits shall also be applicable to lending under Consortium / Multiple
Banking / Syndication Arrangements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be applicable to lending under consortium / multiple banking / syndication arrangements

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken on the third party / borrower and not on the lc issuing bank
controls.control_description:
where LC is issued by the Head Office or branch of the same bank, then the exposure
should be taken on the third party / borrower and not on the LC issuing bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken on the third party / borrower and not on the lc issuing bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated on the borrower
controls.control_description:
In the case
of negotiations 'under reserve', the exposure should be treated on the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated on the borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for computing the exposure to the extent that the bank has a specific lien on such deposits
controls.control_description:
Loans and advances (both funded and non-funded facilities) granted against the
security of a bank's own term deposits should not be reckoned for computing the exposure
to the extent that the bank has a specific lien on such deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for computing the exposure to the extent that the bank has a specific lien on such deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be any exemption from the prohibitions relating to investments in unrated non-slr securities prescribed in terms of reserve bank of india (local area
controls.control_description:
However, there shall not be
any exemption from the prohibitions relating to investments in unrated non-SLR securities
prescribed in terms of Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Classification, Valuation
and Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be any exemption from the prohibitions relating to investments in unrated non-slr securities prescribed in terms of reserve bank of india (local area

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider fixing internal limits for aggregate commitments to specific sectors to ensure diversified sectoral exposure
controls.control_description:
In addition to limiting exposures to a single or group borrowers, a bank shall consider
fixing internal limits for aggregate commitments to specific sectors to ensure diversified
sectoral exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider fixing internal limits for aggregate commitments to specific sectors to ensure diversified sectoral exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be fixed based on the bank's assessment of sectoral performance and associated risk perceptions
controls.control_description:
These sectoral limits shall be fixed based on the bank's assessment of
sectoral performance and associated risk perceptions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be fixed based on the bank's assessment of sectoral performance and associated risk perceptions

controls.control_objective: To ensure review and revise these limits periodically, as deemed appropriate
controls.control_description:
The bank shall review and revise
these limits periodically, as deemed appropriate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review and revise these limits periodically, as deemed appropriate

controls.control_objective: To ensure have board approved limits in respect of various sub-segments under consumer credit as may be considered necessary by the board as part of prudent ris
controls.control_description:
A bank shall have Board approved limits in respect of various sub-segments under
consumer credit as may be considered necessary by the Board as part of prudent risk
management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have board approved limits in respect of various sub-segments under consumer credit as may be considered necessary by the board as part of prudent ris

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prescribed for all unsecured consumer credit exposures
controls.control_description:
In particular, limits shall be prescribed for all unsecured consumer credit
exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prescribed for all unsecured consumer credit exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure be strictly adhered to and monitored on an ongoing basis by the risk management committee
controls.control_description:
The limits so fixed shall be strictly adhered to and monitored on an ongoing
basis by the Risk Management Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be strictly adhered to and monitored on an ongoing basis by the risk management committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as unsecured loans for credit appraisal, prudential limits and exposure purposes
controls.control_description:
All top-up loans extended by a bank against movable assets which are inherently
depreciating in nature, such as vehicles, shall be treated as unsecured loans for credit
appraisal, prudential limits and exposure purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as unsecured loans for credit appraisal, prudential limits and exposure purposes

controls.control_objective: To ensure also consider fixing internal limits for its aggregate exposure to all nbfcs put together
controls.control_description:
A bank may also consider fixing internal limits for its aggregate exposure to all NBFCs
put together.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also consider fixing internal limits for its aggregate exposure to all nbfcs put together

controls.control_objective: To ensure have an internal sub-limit on its aggregate exposures to all nbfcs, having gold loans to the extent of 50 percent or more of their total financial ass
controls.control_description:
The bank should have an internal sub-limit on its aggregate exposures to all NBFCs,
having gold loans to the extent of 50 percent or more of their total financial assets, taken
together.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to have an internal sub-limit on its aggregate exposures to all nbfcs, having gold loans to the extent of 50 percent or more of their total financial ass

controls.control_objective: To ensure be within the internal limit
controls.control_description:
This sub-limit should be within the internal limit, where fixed by the bank for its
aggregate exposure to all NBFCs put together as mentioned in paragraph 21.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be within the internal limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (local area banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
A bank shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Credit
Facilities) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the reserve bank of india (local area banks - credit facilities) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure include both its direct exposures and indirect exposures
controls.control_description:
A bank's capital market exposures shall include both its direct exposures and indirect
exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include both its direct exposures and indirect exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure include the following: (1) a bank's direct investment in equity shares, convertible bonds, convertible debentures and units of equity-oriented mutual
controls.control_description:
The aggregate exposure (both fund and non-fund based) of a bank, if it is
permitted to undertake such exposures in terms of Reserve Bank of India (Local Area
Banks - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025, to capital markets in all forms shall include the
following:
(1) A bank's direct investment in equity shares, convertible bonds, convertible
debentures and units of equity-oriented mutual funds the corpus of which is not
exclusively invested in corporate debt;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include the following: (1) a bank's direct investment in equity shares, convertible bonds, convertible debentures and units of equity-oriented mutual

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold shares in any company, whether as pledgee, mortgagee or absolute owner, of an amount exceeding 30 percent of the paid-up share capital of that company or 30 percent of its own paid-up share capital and reserves, whichever is less
controls.control_description:
In terms of Section 19(2) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, no banking company
shall hold shares in any company, whether as pledgee, mortgagee or absolute owner, of
an amount exceeding 30 percent of the paid-up share capital of that company or 30 percent
of its own paid-up share capital and reserves, whichever is less, except as provided in sub-
section (1) of Section 19 of the Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold shares in any company, whether as pledgee, mortgagee or absolute owner, of an amount exceeding 30 percent of the paid-up share capital of that company or 30 percent of its own paid-up share capital and reserves, whichever is less

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be included for the purpose of determining the exposure limit
controls.control_description:
Shares held in demat form should also be included for
the purpose of determining the exposure limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to also be included for the purpose of determining the exposure limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure strictly adhere to these statutory provisions while granting any advance against shares, underwriting any issue of shares, or acquiring any shares on
controls.control_description:
A bank shall strictly adhere to these statutory provisions while granting any
advance against shares, underwriting any issue of shares, or acquiring any shares on
investment account or even in lieu of debt of any company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to strictly adhere to these statutory provisions while granting any advance against shares, underwriting any issue of shares, or acquiring any shares on

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 40 percent of its net worth, as on march 31 of the previous year
controls.control_description:
The aggregate exposure of a bank to the capital markets in all forms (both fund based,
and non-fund based) shall not exceed 40 percent of its net worth, as on March 31 of the
previous year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 40 percent of its net worth, as on march 31 of the previous year

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 20 percent of its net worth
controls.control_description:
Within this overall ceiling, the bank's direct investment in shares, convertible
bonds / debentures, units of equity-oriented mutual funds and all exposures to Alternate
Investment Funds (AIFs) shall not exceed 20 percent of its net worth.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 20 percent of its net worth

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere the ceilings on an ongoing basis
controls.control_description: A bank shall adhere the ceilings on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adhere the ceilings on an ongoing basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of section 19(2) of the banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
Nonetheless, the bank shall comply
with the provisions of Section 19(2) of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of section 19(2) of the banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure be excluded from the aggregate exposure ceiling of 40 percent of net worth and direct investment exposure ceiling of 20 percent of net worth (wherever
controls.control_description:
The following items should be excluded from the aggregate exposure ceiling of 40
percent of net worth and direct investment exposure ceiling of 20 percent of net worth
(wherever applicable):
(1) A bank's investments in shares and convertible debentures, convertible bonds issued
by institutions forming crucial financial infrastructure such as National Securities
Depository Ltd.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be excluded from the aggregate exposure ceiling of 40 percent of net worth and direct investment exposure ceiling of 20 percent of net worth (wherever

controls.control_objective: To ensure form part of the cme
controls.control_description: prior to listing) shall form part of the CME.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to form part of the cme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned with reference to sanctioned limits or outstanding, whichever is higher
controls.control_description:
For computing the exposure to the capital markets, loans / advances sanctioned and
guarantees issued for capital market operations shall be reckoned with reference to
sanctioned limits or outstanding, whichever is higher.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned with reference to sanctioned limits or outstanding, whichever is higher

controls.control_objective: To ensure reckon the outstanding as the exposure
controls.control_description:
However, in the case of fully drawn
term loans, where there is no scope for re-drawal of any portion of the sanctioned limit, a
bank shall reckon the outstanding as the exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reckon the outstanding as the exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be calculated at its cost price
controls.control_description:
The bank's direct investment in shares, convertible bonds, convertible debentures and
units of equity-oriented mutual funds shall be calculated at its cost price.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be calculated at its cost price

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board-approved policy for fixing intra-day exposure limits to the capital markets and establish an appropriate system for ongoing monit
controls.control_description:
The bank shall put in place a Board-approved policy for fixing intra-day exposure limits
to the capital markets and establish an appropriate system for ongoing monitoring of such
limits.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a board-approved policy for fixing intra-day exposure limits to the capital markets and establish an appropriate system for ongoing monit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by the reserve bank of india (local area banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
A bank shall be guided by the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Prudential
Norms on Capital Adequacy) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by the reserve bank of india (local area banks - prudential norms on capital adequacy) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer 'safety net' or any such facilities, which would entail commitments to buy the securities from the investors at a pre-determined price during a
controls.control_description:
A bank shall not offer 'Safety Net' or any such facilities, which would entail
commitments to buy the securities from the investors at a pre-determined price during a
stipulated period, irrespective of the prevailing market price.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer 'safety net' or any such facilities, which would entail commitments to buy the securities from the investors at a pre-determined price during a

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide commitments to buy the securities at pre-determined prices
controls.control_description:
If a bank provides a buy back arrangement to small investors subscribing to new issues,
such an arrangement shall not provide commitments to buy the securities at pre-determined
prices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide commitments to buy the securities at pre-determined prices

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined from time to time, keeping in view the prevailing stock market prices for the securities
controls.control_description:
Prices should be determined from time to time, keeping in view the prevailing stock
market prices for the securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined from time to time, keeping in view the prevailing stock market prices for the securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be limited to a moderate proportion of the total issue in terms of the amount and should not exceed 25 percent of the owned funds of the bank
controls.control_description:
Commitments should also be limited to a moderate
proportion of the total issue in terms of the amount and should not exceed 25 percent of
the owned funds of the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be limited to a moderate proportion of the total issue in terms of the amount and should not exceed 25 percent of the owned funds of the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be subject to the overall exposure limits which have been or may be prescribed from time to time
controls.control_description:
These commitments shall also be subject to the overall
exposure limits which have been or may be prescribed from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be subject to the overall exposure limits which have been or may be prescribed from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these
Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under these
repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced
and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those
directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect
of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions
given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
